_publications._publicationTitle: Applying microsatellite multiplex PCR analysis (MMPA) for determining allele copy-number status and percentage of normal cells within tumors.

_contextSnippet: The script calculates and outputs the Kμ, comparing the reactions of control-tumor pairs, the average percentage of normal tissue contamination in the tumor, and the overall mechanism of AI for the test sample
details: Calculates and outputs Kμ, average percentage of normal tissue contamination, overall AI mechanism, and detailed microsatellite analysis parameters
